issues.description: Trigger should be 'OnAttacked' (when attack deals damage), not 'OnAttack' (when attack is declared)
Action type 'TrashFromHand' is incorrect. Effect trashes from deck (top of deck), not hand. Should be 'ForceDiscard' with source:'Deck' or similar deck-trash mechanism
Missing condition for [DON!! x1] requirement. Should include cost/condition check for DON availability
Missing 'may' optionality. Action should be optional, not mandatory
